title: avenastrum pratense
intro: Avenastrum pratense, also known as Knot-grass, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Poaceae, native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anthelmintic, diuretic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Avenastrum pratense include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, or as a dried herb in capsules or powder form.
